opt-in Pages and Launch Funnels
▪ 	Leadpages
▪ 	We’ve used Leadpages to create our funnel and launches
▪ 	Great for opt-in pages, sales pages, webinar pages, webcast
pages, thank you pages, etc.
▪ 	Disclaimer: Run by Clay Collins - a long-time friend
▪ 	Tested designs that integrate with Wordpress, Facebook,
standalone pages - or they’ll host the page for you
▪ 	http://productlaunchformula.com/leadpages
